A1.example: First, eat your dinner, then you can play.

A1.definition: In, at, or to that place or position.
A1.example: The book is over there.

A1.definition: Used to refer to two or more people or things.
A1.example: They are my friends.

A1.definition: An object or something that is not named.
A1.example: What is that thing?

A1.definition: To have an opinion or idea.
A1.example: I think it will rain.

A1.definition: Feeling a need to drink.
A1.example: I am thirsty, can I have some water?
